summary: By default defOut writes out polygon DIEAREA if the design is rectilinear. To write out rectangular DIEAERA along with blockages in cut-out area for a rectilinear design, set this variable to false.
description: By default defOut writes out polygon DIEAREA if the design is rectilinear. To write out rectangular DIEAERA along with blockages in cut-out area for a rectilinear design, set this variable to false.
